lines.gurmukhi: ਅਟਲ ਬਚਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਤੇਰਾ ਸਫਲ ਕਰੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥੨॥੨੧॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: attal bachan naanak gur teraa safal kar masatak dhaariaa |2|21|49|
lines.english: Your Word is eternal, O Guru Nanak; You placed Your Hand of blessing upon my forehead. ||2||21||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ੍ਰ ਸਭਿ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਕੀਏ ਸੋਈ ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jantr sabh tis ke kee soee sant sahaaee |
lines.english: All beings and creatures were created by Him; He alone is the support and friend of the Saints.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੀ ਆਪੇ ਰਾਖੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਈ ਬਡਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: apune sevak kee aape raakhai pooran bhee baddaaee |1|
lines.english: He Himself preserves the honor of His servants; their glorious greatness becomes perfect. ||1||
The Perfect Supreme Lord God is always with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪੂਰੀ ਸਭ ਰਾਖੀ ਹੋਏ ਸਰਬ ਦਇਆਲ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai pooree sabh raakhee hoe sarab deaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has perfectly and totally protected me, and now everyone is kind and compassionate to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naanak naam dhiaae jeea praan kaa daataa |
lines.english: Night and day, Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; He is the Giver of the soul, and the breath of life itself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨੇ ਦਾਸ ਕਉ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਰਾਖੈ ਜਿਉ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਪਿਤ ਮਾਤਾ ॥੨॥੨੨॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: apune daas kau kantth laae raakhai jiau baarik pit maataa |2|22|50|
lines.english: He hugs His slave close in His loving embrace, like the mother and father hug their child. ||2||22||50||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Chau-Padhay:
The chiefs did not give me satisfaction.
I presented my dispute to the noblemen as well.
But it was only settled by meeting with the King, my Lord. ||1||
Meeting with the council, my doubts were not dispelled.
When I came to God's Darbaar, His Holy Court,
because I have met the Guru, the Lord of the Universe. ||Pause||
Now, I do not go searching anywhere else,
where should I come and where should I go? ||2||
then all of my cries and complaints were settled.
Now that I have attained what I had sought,
There, true justice is administered.
There, the Lord Master and His disciple are one and the same.
Without our speaking, He understands. ||3||
The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, knows.
There, the unstruck melody of the Shabad resounds.
Meeting with Him, O Nanak, one loses his self-conceit. ||4||1||51||
He is the King of all places.
Of what use is cleverness when dealing with Him?
sitting within your own home, meditate on the Guru.
Enshrine the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within your heart;
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
the True Peace is obtained only from the Lord. ||1||
My Guru has become merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਸੂਖ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਮੰਗਲ ਸਿਉ ਘਰਿ ਆਏ ਕਰਿ ਇਸਨਾਨਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anad sookh kaliaan mangal siau ghar aae kar isanaanaa | rahaau |
lines.english: In bliss, peace, pleasure and joy, I have returned to my own home, after my purifying bath. ||Pause||
The Perfect Guru has spoken the Truth;
True is the glorious greatness of the Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: His worth cannot be described.
He is the Supreme Overlord of kings.
meeting with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
Meeting with the Guru, the mind is enraptured. ||2||
All sins are washed away,
The Lord's Name is the treasure of excellence;
The Guru has opened the door of liberation,
chanting it, one's affairs are perfectly resolved. ||3||
O Nanak, God is always with me;
my fears of birth and death are gone. ||4||2||52||
and the entire world applauds Him with cheers of victory.
and God has fulfilled my desire.
After taking my bath of purification, I returned to my home,
The Perfect Guru has granted His Grace,
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
and I found bliss, happiness and peace. ||1||
O Saints, salvation comes from the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਤ ਬੈਠਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੁਕ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਕਰੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aootthat baitthat har har dhiaaeeai anadin sukrit kareeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: While standing up and sitting down, meditate on the Lord's Name. Night and day, do good deeds. ||1||Pause||
